intent: Three-step KYC onboarding wizard: personal data and address, identification method with conditional VideoIdent appointment, then GwG compliance gate (PEP, FATCA, beneficial owner, AGB, privacy).
notes: Tier-2 banking baseline (GwG-/FATCA-konforme Kontoeroeffnung): three screens linked by four navigation edges (forward/back chain). Step 3 carries five RADIO_OPTION compliance gates each Required, plus one TEXT_INPUT whose Required validation is conditional on the beneficial-owner radio. The cascade across screens lets the harness exercise multi-screen technique-coverage and conditional-requiredness propagation; the back-edges let it exercise state retention and re-entry.
